name: Wild Blueberry Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Milk (more if 2 cups flour used)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl.
2. Stir in the blueberries. Do not thaw if using frozen berries.
3. Cream the shortening until soft. Gradually beat in the sugar, then the lemon rind and egg.
4. Add the flour mixture alternately with milk, beating until smooth after each addition. (Frozen blueberries could be folded in quickly at the end; the dough turns purple as they thaw.)
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 10-12 minutes or until lightly browned.
